'''Will Neluenf''', a native of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], was a [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|Podracer]] in an illegal [[Podracing/Legends|Podrace]] on [[Euceron]] during the [[Galactic Games/Legends|Galactic Games]] of [[26 BBY/Legends|26 BBY]].

Will was the heir to the first great Tatooine Podracer, [[Ben Neluenf/Legends|Ben Neluenf]]. He battled [[Hekula]], [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba's]] son, and then 14-year-old [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] in an illegal [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]] event at the [[Great Dordon Caves]] during the [[Eusebus]]-based Games. Neluenf's pod trailed closely behind Hekula's but he was unable to pass either him or Skywalker when the Jedi's pod began spinning wildly out of control just before crossing the finish line. While Neluenf failed to overtake either contestant, he still managed to finish third.

Skywalker won the race on behalf of the children of [[Ratts Tyerell/Legends|Ratts Tyerell]]—[[Deland Tyerell/Legends|Deland]] and [[Doby Tyerell|Doby]], whose podracer Anakin piloted to free their sister-slave [[Djulla Tyerell|Djulla]] from the clutches of her master, Sebulba.

Other Caves race contestants included [[Ody Mandrell/Legends|Ody Mandrell]], [[Aldar Beedo/Legends|Aldar Beedo]], [[Gasgano/Legends|Gasgano]], [[Kam Nale|Elan Mak]], and "Scorch" [[Zanales]].
